channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Ancient DNA reveals women's role in transforming prehistoric Europe
item.description: New DNA evidence shows hunter-gatherers and early farmers interacted more closely than thought, with women likely playing a key role.

item.title: New phase of matter could transform quantum technology
item.description: Scientists stabilized a mysterious crystal phase by stacking custom-designed silver nanoparticles like nanoscale LEGO bricks.

item.title: Caffeine reversed memory issues caused by lack of sleep
item.description: Researchers found that sleep deprivation harms a brain circuit for social memory, impairing recognition of familiar individuals.

item.title: Triassic crocodile relative resembled an ostrich dinosaur
item.description: Scientists identified Labrujasuchus expectatus, a strange crocodile relative that looked more like an ostrich-like dinosaur.
